title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Adidas India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Adidas India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Adidas India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Adidas India:
Adidas India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
